entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: Singachibiyela i-Terms nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokuthumela imigomo echibiyelwe kule sayithi. Kuwumthwalo wakho ukubuyekeza le Terms ngezikhathi ezithile. Ukuqhubeka kwakho nokusebenzisa i-Platform ngemva kokuthunyelwa kwe-Terms ebuyekeziwe kusho ukuthi wamukela futhi uyavuma izinguquko. Kulindeleke ukuthi uhlole leli khasi njalo ukuze wazi noma yiziphi izinguquko, ngoba ziyakubopha. Ngokuqhubeka nokufinyelela noma ukusebenzisa i-Service yethu ngemva kokuthi noma yiziphi izibuyekezo seziqalile ukusebenza, uyavuma ukuboshelwa yimigomo ebuyekeziwe. Uma ungavumelani nemigomo emisha, awusenagunya lokusebenzisa i-Service.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: Singadalula ulwazi lomuntu siqu esiluqoqayo, noma osinikeza lona: Ukudalulwa Kwezomthetho: Ezimweni ezithile, kungadingeka ukuthi sidalule i-Data yakho uma kudingwa umthetho noma ukuphendula izicelo ezisemthethweni zeziphathimandla zomphakathi. Ukuthengiselana Kwebhizinisi: Uma izinkampani zethu ezingaphansi noma thina sibandakanyeka ekuhlanganisweni, ekuthengweni, noma ekuthengisweni kwempahla, i-Personal Data yakho ingadluliselwa. Amanye amacala. Singase futhi sidalule ulwazi lwakho: ezinkampanini zethu ezingaphansi nasezihlobene nathi; kosonkontileka, abahlinzeki bezinsizakalo, nabanye abantu besithathu esibasebenzisayo ukusekela ibhizinisi lethu; ukufeza injongo oyinikeze yona; ukufaka ilogo yenkampani yakho kuwebhusayithi yethu; nganoma iyiphi enye injongo esiyidalulayo lapho usinikeza ulwazi; ngemvume yakho kwezinye izimo; uma sikholwa ukuthi ukudalulwa kuyadingeka noma kufanelekile ukuvikela amalungelo, impahla, noma ukuphepha kwe-Company, amakhasimende ethu, noma abanye.

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: Singase siqashe izinkampani nabantu besithathu ukusiza i-Service yethu ("Service Providers"), ukuhlinzeka nge-Service egameni lethu, ukwenza izinsizakalo ezihlobene ne-Service, noma ukusisiza sihlaziye indlela i-Service yethu esetshenziswa ngayo. Laba bantu besithathu banokufinyelela ku-Personal Data yakho kuphela ukuze benze le misebenzi egameni lethu futhi babophezelekile ukuthi bangayidaluli noma bayisebenzisele enye injongo.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: Singase sinikeze imikhiqizo kanye/noma izinsizakalo ezikhokhelwayo ngaphakathi kwe-Service. Kuleso simo, sisebenzisa izinsizakalo zabantu besithathu ukucubungula izinkokhelo (isb. abacubunguli bezinkokhelo). Ngeke sigcine noma siqoqe imininingwane yekhadi lakho lokukhokha. Lolo lwazi lunikezwa ngqo kubacubunguli bethu bezinkokhelo besithathu, ukusetshenziswa kwabo kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu kulawulwa yi-Privacy Policy yabo. Laba bacubunguli bezinkokhelo balandela amazinga abekwe yi-PCI-DSS njengoba ephethwe yi-PCI Security Standards Council, okuyimizamo ehlanganyelwe yamabhizinisi afana ne-Visa, Mastercard, American Express ne-Discover. Izidingo ze-PCI-DSS zisiza ukuqinisekisa ukuphathwa okuphephile kolwazi lokukhokha.

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: Singanqamula noma simise i-akhawunti yakho futhi sivimbele ukufinyelela ku-Service ngokushesha, ngaphandle kwesaziso sangaphambili noma icala, ngokokubona kwethu kuphela, nganoma yisiphi isizathu futhi ngaphandle komkhawulo, kuhlanganise kodwa kungagcini ngokwephulwa kwe-Terms. Uma ufuna ukunqamula i-akhawunti yakho, ungamane uyeke ukusebenzisa i-Service. Zonke izinhlinzeko ze-Terms okufanele ngokwemvelo yazo zisinde ekunqanyulweni zizosinda, kuhlanganise, ngaphandle komkhawulo, izinhlinzeko zobunikazi, ukuphikwa kweziqinisekiso, ukunxeshezelwa, nemikhawulo yesibopho.

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: Singase sibuyekeze i-Privacy Policy yethu ngezikhathi ezithile. Sizokwazisa nganoma yiziphi izinguquko ngokuthumela i-Privacy Policy entsha kuleli khasi. Sizokwazisa nge-imeyili kanye/noma ngesaziso esivelele ku-Service yethu ngaphambi kokuthi ushintsho luqale ukusebenza, futhi sibuyekeze "effective date" phezulu kwale Privacy Policy. Welulekwa ukuthi ubuyekeze le Privacy Policy ngezikhathi ezithile ukuze ubone noma yiziphi izinguquko. Izinguquko kule Privacy Policy ziqala ukusebenza lapho zithunyelwa kuleli khasi.

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: Singase sisebenzise izinsizakalo zokumaketha kabusha ukukukhangisela kumawebhusayithi abantu besithathu ngemva kokuvakashela i-Service yethu. Thina nabathengisi bethu besithathu sisebenzisa amakhukhi ukwazisa, ukwenza ngcono, nokunikeza izikhangiso ezisekelwe ekuvakasheni kwakho kwangaphambilini ku-Service yethu.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: Singase sisebenzise ama-Service Providers abantu besithathu ukuzenzakalelisa inqubo yokuthuthukisa i-Service yethu.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.
entries.value: Singase sisebenzise ama-Service Providers abantu besithathu ukuqapha nokuhlaziya ukusetshenziswa kwe-Service yethu.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: Singase sisebenzise ama-Service Providers abantu besithathu ukukubonisa izikhangiso ukuze sisize ukusekela nokugcina i-Service yethu.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: Sigodla ilungelo lokuhoxisa noma ukuchibiyela i-Service yethu, nanoma iyiphi insizakalo noma into esiyihlinzeka nge-Service, ngokokubona kwethu kuphela ngaphandle kwesaziso. Ngeke sibe nesibopho uma nganoma yisiphi isizathu yonke noma ingxenye ye-Service ingatholakali nganoma yisiphi isikhathi noma isikhathi esithile. Ngezikhathi ezithile, singakhawulela ukufinyelela kwezinye izingxenye ze-Service, noma kuyo yonke i-Service, kubasebenzisi, kuhlanganise nabasebenzisi ababhalisiwe.

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: Siyawahlonipha amalungelo empahla yengqondo yabanye. Kuyinqubomgomo yethu ukuphendula kunoma yisiphi isimangalo sokuthi i-Content ethunyelwe ku-Service yephula ilungelo lobunikazi noma amanye amalungelo empahla yengqondo ("Infringement") womuntu noma inhlangano. Uma ungumnikazi welungelo lobunikazi, noma ugunyazwe egameni lomnikazi, futhi ukholwa ukuthi umsebenzi one-copyright ukopishwe ngendlela eyakha ukwephulwa kwe-copyright, sicela uthumele isimangalo sakho nge-imeyili ku-support@inspir.app, ngesihloko esithi: "Copyright Infringement" futhi ufake encwadini yakho incazelo enemininingwane ye-Infringement esolwayo njengoba kuchazwe ngezansi, ngaphansi kokuthi "DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims" Ungabekwa icala lomonakalo (kuhlanganise nezindleko nezimali zabameli) ngenxa yokumelela kabi noma izimangalo zobubi bokwephulwa kwanoma iyiphi i-Content etholakala ku-Service kanye/noma ngayo ku-copyright yakho.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: Sisebenzisa amakhukhi nobuchwepheshe bokulandela obufanayo ukulandelela umsebenzi ku-Service yethu futhi sigcina ulwazi oluthile. Amakhukhi amafayela anedatha encane engase ihlanganise isihlonzi esiyingqayizivele esingaziwa. Amakhukhi athunyelwa esipheqululini sakho esuka kuwebhusayithi futhi agcinwa kudivayisi yakho. Obunye ubuchwepheshe bokulandela busetshenziswa futhi, njenge-beacons, tags, kanye nama-scripts, ukuqoqa nokulandela ulwazi nokuthuthukisa nokuhlaziya i-Service yethu. Ungayalela isiphequluli sakho ukuthi senqabe wonke amakhukhi noma sikutshele lapho ikhukhi lithunyelwa. Nokho, uma ungawamukeli amakhukhi, ungase ungakwazi ukusebenzisa ezinye izingxenye ze-Service yethu. Izibonelo zama-Cookies esiwasebenzisayo:Session Cookies: Sisebenzisa ama-Session Cookies ukuze sisebenzise i-Service yethu. Preference Cookies: Sisebenzisa ama-Preference Cookies ukukhumbula okuncamelayo nezilungiselelo ezahlukene. Security Cookies: Sisebenzisa ama-Security Cookies ngezinjongo zokuphepha. Advertising Cookies: Ama-Advertising Cookies asetshenziselwa ukukuletha izikhangiso ezingase zihambisane nawe nezintshisekelo zakho.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: Saphumela ngaphandle kweplanethi yethu. Nokho, intuthuko esheshayo nenomthelela omkhulu kakhulu yaba kwezokuxhumana nobuchwepheshe, okuxhumanise abantu bomhlaba abangaphezu kwezigidigidi ezi-3.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: Sizogcina i-Personal Data yakho kuphela isikhathi esidingekayo ngezinjongo ezichazwe kule Privacy Policy. Sizogcina futhi sisebenzise i-Personal Data yakho ngezinga elidingekayo ukuze sithobele izibopho zethu zomthetho (isibonelo, uma kudingeka sigcine idatha yakho ukuze sithobele imithetho esebenzayo), sixazulule izingxabano, futhi sisebenzise izivumelwano nezinqubomgomo zethu zomthetho. Sizogcina futhi i-Usage Data ngezinjongo zokuhlaziya zangaphakathi. I-Usage Data ngokuvamile igcinwa isikhathi esifushane, ngaphandle uma le datha isetshenziselwa ukuqinisa ukuphepha noma ukuthuthukisa ukusebenza kwe-Service yethu, noma uma sibophezelekile ngokomthetho ukuyigcina isikhathi eside.

These Terms of Service (“Terms”, “Terms of Service”) govern your use of our website located atwww.inspir.appand applications available on app stores (together or individually “Service”) operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Our Privacy Policy also governs your use of our Service and explains how we collect, safeguard and disclose information that results from your use of our web pages. The privacy policy is available at inspir.app/privacy Your agreement with us includes these Terms and our Privacy Policy (“Agreements”). You acknowledge that you have read and understood the Agreements, and agree to be bound of them. If you do not agree with (or cannot comply with) Agreements, then you may not use the Service, but please let us know by emailing support@inspir.appso we can try to find a solution. These Terms apply to all visitors, users and others who wish to access or use the Service.
entries.value: Siyakwamukela ku-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ("Company", "we", "our", "us")! Le Terms of Service ("Terms", "Terms of Service") ilawula ukusebenzisa kwakho iwebhusayithi yethu etholakala ku-www.inspir.app nezinhlelo zokusebenza ezitholakala ezitolo zezinhlelo zokusebenza (ndawonye noma ngokwehlukana "Service") esetshenziswa yi-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). I-Privacy Policy yethu nayo ilawula ukusebenzisa kwakho i-Service yethu futhi ichaza indlela esiqoqa, sivikela, futhi sidalula ngayo ulwazi oluvela ekusebenziseni kwakho amakhasi ethu ewebhu. Inqubomgomo yobumfihlo itholakala ku-inspir.app/privacy Isivumelwano sakho nathi sihlanganisa le Terms ne-Privacy Policy yethu ("Agreements"). Uyavuma ukuthi uyifundile futhi uyiqondile i-Agreements, futhi uyavuma ukuboshelwa yiyo. Uma ungavumelani (noma ungakwazi ukuthobela) i-Agreements, awukwazi ukusebenzisa i-Service, kodwa sicela usazise ngokuthumela i-imeyili ku-support@inspir.app ukuze sizame ukuthola isixazululo. Le Terms isebenza kubo bonke abavakashi, abasebenzisi, nabanye abafuna ukufinyelela noma ukusebenzisa i-Service.

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: Lapho udala i-akhawunti nathi, uqinisekisa ukuthi ulwazi osinikeza lona lunembile, luphelele, futhi lusesikhathini ngazo zonke izikhathi. Ulwazi olungalungile, olungaphelele, noma oluphelelwe yisikhathi lungaholela ekunqanyulweni kwe-akhawunti yakho ku-Service ngokushesha. Unesibopho sokugcina ubumfihlo be-akhawunti nephasiwedi yakho, kuhlanganise kodwa kungagcini ngokukhawulela ukufinyelela kukhompuyutha yakho kanye/noma i-akhawunti yakho. Uyavuma ukwamukela isibopho sanoma yimiphi imisebenzi noma izenzo ezenzeka ngaphansi kwe-akhawunti yakho kanye/noma iphasiwedi yakho, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi iphasiwedi yakho iku-Service yethu noma kusevisi yomuntu wesithathu. Kufanele usazise ngokushesha lapho uqaphela noma yikuphi ukwephulwa kokuphepha noma ukusetshenziswa okungagunyaziwe kwe-akhawunti yakho. Awukwazi ukusebenzisa njengegama lomsebenzisi igama lomunye umuntu noma inhlangano noma elingatholakali ngokusemthethweni ukuze lisetshenziswe, igama noma uphawu lokuhweba olungaphansi kwanoma yimaphi amalungelo omunye umuntu noma inhlangano ngaphandle kwakho, ngaphandle kwemvume efanele. Awukwazi ukusebenzisa njengegama lomsebenzisi noma yiliphi igama elihlaselayo, elingcolile, noma eliyichilo. Sigodla ilungelo lokwenqaba i-service, ukunqamula ama-akhawunti, ukususa noma ukuhlela okuqukethwe, noma ukukhansela ama-oda ngokokubona kwethu kuphela.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Lapho unamathisela amanothi ku-AI, yicele ihlukanise imibono ebanzi ibe yileyo misebenzi. Iqoqo elinamakhadi acacile angu-18 ngokuvamile lingcono kuneqoqo elinamakhadi amakhulu angu-5 lapho ikhadi ngalinye liqukethe isigaba sonke.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: Ngesikhathi usebenzisa i-Service yethu, singase futhi siqoqe ulwazi olulandelayo: ubulili, iminyaka, usuku lokuzalwa, indawo yokuzalwa, imininingwane yepasipoti, ubuzwe, ukubhaliswa endaweni yokuhlala nekheli langempela, inombolo yocingo (yasemsebenzini, yeselula), imininingwane yemibhalo yezemfundo, iziqu, ukuqeqeshwa kobungcweti, izivumelwano zokuqashwa, ulwazi ngamabhonasi nesinxephezelo, ulwazi ngesimo somshado, amalungu omndeni, inombolo ye-social security (noma enye inombolo yokuhlonza umkhokhi wentela), indawo yehhovisi nenye idatha. Payment Data. Singaqoqa idatha edingekayo ukucubungula inkokhelo yakho uma uthenga, njengenombolo yethuluzi lakho lokukhokha (njengenombolo yekhadi lesikweletu), kanye nekhodi yokuphepha ehlobene nethuluzi lakho lokukhokha. Yonke i-payment data igcinwa yi-Razorpay. Ungathola izixhumanisi zesaziso sabo sobumfihlo lapha: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: Ngesikhathi usebenzisa i-Service yethu, singase sikucela ukuthi usinikeze ulwazi oluthile olungakuhlonza olungasetshenziswa ukuxhumana nawe noma ukukuhlonza ("Personal Data"). Ulwazi olungakuhlonza lungahlanganisa, kodwa lungagcini kulokhu: Ikheli le-imeyili loMfundi noMzali Igama lokuqala nesibongo soMfundi noMzali Inombolo yocingo yoMfundi noMzali Ikheli, Izwe, Isifunda, Isifundazwe, ZIP/Postal code, Idolobha Igama lesikole Ikilasi Cookies and Usage Data Singase sisebenzise i-Data yakho ukuxhumana nawe ngezincwadi zezindaba, izinto zokumaketha noma zokukhangisa, nolunye ulwazi olungakuthakazelisa. Ungazikhipha ekwamukeleni noma yiziphi, noma zonke, lezi zixhumano ngokulandela isixhumanisi sokuzikhipha. Usage Data, Singase futhi siqoqe ulwazi oluthunyelwa isiphequluli sakho noma nini lapho uvakashela i-Service yethu noma lapho ufinyelela i-Service ngedivayisi ("Usage Data"). Le Usage Data ingahlanganisa ulwazi olufana nekheli le-Internet Protocol lekhompuyutha yakho (isb. IP address), uhlobo lwesiphequluli, inguqulo yesiphequluli, amakhasi e-Service yethu owavakashelayo, isikhathi nosuku lokuvakasha kwakho, isikhathi osichithe kulawo makhasi, izihlonzi ezihlukile zedivayisi nenye idatha yokuxilonga. Lapho ufinyelela i-Service ngedivayisi, le Usage Data ingahlanganisa ulwazi olufana nohlobo lwedivayisi oyisebenzisayo, i-ID yedivayisi yakho eyingqayizivele, ikheli le-IP ledivayisi yakho, uhlelo lokusebenza lwedivayisi yakho, uhlobo lwesiphequluli se-Internet osisebenzisayo, izihlonzi ezihlukile zedivayisi nenye idatha yokuxilonga.

entries.source: Worksheet Builder
World capitals

World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: Umlando Womhlaba kuzo zonke izikhathi ubufana nokuhlehlisa ukubuka isithombe, isithombe esasihlala sishintsha. Amakhulu eminyaka aholela ekhulwini le-19 amaka iphuzu lokuguquka emlandweni wesintu, njengoba umhlaba wasuka embonweni oyisicaba nonomkhawulo waya ekuqondeni okwandayo kwezindawo ezintsha namakoloni. I-French Revolution yamaka okokuqala lapho inani elikhulu labantu lahlelana khona ukubhikisha nokusungula imigomo yenkululeko, ukulingana, nobuzalwane. Izehlakalo zeMpi Yezwe II nazo zabumba umhlaba wekhulu leminyaka elilandelayo futhi zabeka isisekelo sekhulu lama-21.

Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: Yebo, kodwa ukugeleza komsebenzi okunconyiwe kuqala ngeseluleko. Yisebenzise ukuqonda indlela, ukuhlola umsebenzi wakho, nokubuyekeza amaphutha esikhundleni sokukopisha impendulo yokugcina.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Yebo, uma ikunikeza amathiphu, ihlola ukucabanga, ichaza amaphutha, futhi ikucela ukuba ukhiqize impendulo yokugcina esikhundleni sokukubhalela yona.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: Yebo. I-{value1} ivuleka njengemodi yokufunda yesivakashi yomphakathi ku-{value2}, ngakho ungaqala ngemiyalezo embalwa yamahhala yesivakashi ngaphambi kokudala i-akhawunti.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Yebo. Ukugeleza komsebenzi okuhle ukufunda isisekelo emthonjeni wesifundo othembekile, bese usebenzisa inspir ukubuza imibuzo elandelayo, ukuzijwayeza ukukhumbula, ukulungisa ukungaqondi, nokuhlela okuzobuyekezwa ngokulandelayo.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Yebo. Isikole singaqala ngokuhlola izindlela zomphakathi, bese siya kuphayilothi noma ekuthunyelweni okwenziwe ngokwezifiso lapho ukusetshenziswa, izidingo zokuqukethwe, nendlela yoxhaso sekucacile.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Yebo. Amakhasi ezethameli axhumanisa kuphela nezindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi, imihlahlandlela, iziqalo zemiyalo, izindlela zokufunda, namafayela okutholwa afundeka yi-AI. Izingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe zihlala zingafakiwe.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Yebo. Amakhasi ezigaba axhumanisa nezindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi, izindlela zokufunda, namaqoqo ezihloko ukuze abafundi basuke ekufundeni baye ekufundisweni, kuma-quiz, emakhadini okufunda, enkulumweni-mpikiswano, ekuhleleni, noma empendulweni.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Yebo. I-Code Tutor ingachaza imiqondo, ihambe ngezibonelo, ikucele ukubikezela ukuziphatha, futhi ikusize uzijwayeze ngaphandle kokuguqula ukufunda kube ukukopisha nokunamathisela.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Yebo. I-Exam Prep Planner ingaguqula izihloko zakho, usuku, nesikhathi onaso kube uchungechunge olusebenzayo lokubuyekeza olunokuzijwayeza nokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Yebo. Izindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi zivumela othisha ukuhlola ukuziphatha kokufunda ngaphambi kokuxoxa ngokuthunyelwa okwenziwe ngokwezifiso.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Yebo. Izindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi ezifana ne-Learn Anything, i-Homework Coach, i-Socratic Instruction, ama-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, nempendulo yokubhala zivuleka ngqo.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Yebo. Izindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi ezifana ne-Learn Anything, i-Socratic Instruction, i-Homework Coach, ama-quiz, namakhadi okufunda zivuleka ngqo kuma-URL asemthethweni e-/chat/{topicSlug}.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Yebo. Ama-URL emodi yomphakathi avuleka ngqo kumodi yesivakashi ukuze umfundi aqale ngokushesha, bese edala i-akhawunti kamuva uma efuna umlando ogciniwe noma ukusetshenziswa okwengeziwe.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Yebo. Izindlela zomphakathi zisebenza ezihlokweni zesikole, amakhono omsebenzi, ukubhala ikhodi, ucwaningo, amaphrojekthi, nemikhuba yomuntu siqu yokutadisha.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Yebo. Izingxoxo zezihloko zomphakathi ezifana no-Funda Noma Yini, Imfundo kaSocrates, Umqeqeshi Womsebenzi Wasekhaya, imibuzo, namakhadi enkumbulo zivuleka ngqo kumodi yesivakashi.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Yebo. Izindawo zokungena zezihloko zomphakathi ezifana no-/chat/learn-anything no-/chat/socratic-instruction zihloselwe ukuba amakhasi okufunda angafakwa enkombeni.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Yebo. I-Quiz, i-Flashcard Builder, ne-Spaced Review yizindlela zomphakathi eziklanyelwe ukukhumbula okusebenzayo nokulungisa amaphutha.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Yebo. I-Reading Companion ingenza iziqephu zibe lula, ibuze imibuzo, ichaze ulwazimagama, futhi ikusize uthole isimangalo esiyinhloko nobufakazi obusekelayo.
